seoTitle: How to Permanently Delete Your Gumroad Account
metaDescription: Learn how to safely close your Gumroad account for good, including checking pending payouts and confirming the final deletion step.
intro: Deleting your Gumroad account is a permanent action, so it's worth understanding what to check beforehand. This guide covers reviewing your payout status, removing active listings, and completing the final confirmation so your account is closed safely.

steps.heading: Open your account settings
steps.body: Go to your Gumroad settings menu to find the account and privacy options.

steps.heading: Review your payout history
steps.body: Make sure any outstanding balance has been paid out before proceeding, since you won't be able to access it after deletion.

steps.heading: Remove active listings or subscriptions
steps.body: Disable any recurring products or public listings tied to your account.

steps.heading: Find the account deletion option
steps.body: Locate the account deletion control, usually near the bottom of your settings page.

steps.heading: Confirm the deletion
steps.body: Enter your password to verify your identity and confirm the permanent deletion.

faq.question: Can I recover my Gumroad account after deleting it?
faq.answer: No, account deletion on Gumroad is permanent, so make sure you've backed up anything important first.

faq.question: What happens to my pending balance if I delete my account?
faq.answer: You should confirm your balance has been fully paid out before deleting, since you may lose access to it afterward.

faq.question: Will my digital library still be accessible after deletion?
faq.answer: No, once your account is deleted, you lose access to your purchase history and library.

faq.question: Do I need to remove my products before deleting my account?
faq.answer: It's a good practice to disable active listings and subscriptions before going through with deletion.
